"Babile","Berkele","Berkele Water Supply","Water Project","The Berkele Water Supply Scheme, the largest infrastructure under the RFSA/Ifaa program, was developed by Hararghe Catholic Secretariat (HCS) and Catholic Relief Services (CRS) with USG, DoS funding in FY25-26. It rehabilitated a 40-meter-deep borehole with a discharge rate of 7.8 liters per second, and due to the area’s challenging topography, included a booster pump station with a 75 m³ reservoir and solar-powered systems for both the borehole and pump station. The system delivers its service through the constructed 8 community water points, 2 cattle troughs, 2 school water points and 1 Tap for Health facility. HCS managed well drilling, electromechanical, civil, and pipeline work, while the local community and government offices contributed labor and facilitation support. Water quality tests confirmed the supply is safe for consumption, and a ten-member Water User Association executive committee will oversee all aspects of the water system.",2026,9.1903821146,42.260815501,"5900",NA,52750000,"Almost Completed","Not Handed Over","Functional","Yes","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Chinaksen","Mekenisa Oromo","Mekenisa Oromo Water Supply","Water Project","This is a new 145m deep borehole with an 18.5kw solar-powered submersible pump was installed for the water supply scheme. Civil works included supplying and laying 1740m of GI pipes of various sizes, maintaining the existing 50m³ masonry reservoir, rehabilitating two water points and two cattle troughs, and building two additional water points.",2023,9.5559844,42.8763362,"1744",NA,15216798.37,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","Yes","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Chinaksen","Beleyga","Beleyga Water Supply","Water Project","This water supply scheme involves drilling a new deep borehole, reaching 200 meters in depth, and installing a solar-powered submersible pump with a 26-kW capacity to operate the system. Civil works for the rehabilitation of the existing infrastructure include maintaining and upgrading pressure and distribution pipelines by supplying and laying 2,415 meters of GI pipes of various sizes. Additionally, the project covers maintenance of the current 50 m³ sandwich masonry reservoir, as well as the upkeep and restoration of 6 water points and 2 cattle troughs.",2023,9.5606609,42.9434583,"1160",NA,19537157.08,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","Yes","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Deder","Geba Gudina","Geba Gudina Yatu Spring","Water Project","Development of protected gravity spring with a distribution system comprises of constructions of spring capping structure at the source, 50m3 capacity sandwich masonry collection reservoir, water points (4) and supply & installations of GI & HDPE pipes for transmission & distribution systems.",2024,9.321076,41.514721,"2000",NA,2896457.18,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","Yes","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Deder","Cheka Gemechu","Cheka Gemechu Spring","Water Project","Development of protected gravity spring with a distribution system comprises constructions of spring capping structure at the source, 50m3 capacity sandwich masonry collection reservoir, water points (3), cattle trough (1) and 4200m HDPE pipelines for transmission & distribution systems.",2025,9.275946971,41.34202178,"2000",NA,3736788.93,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","Yes","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Fedis","Kerensa Lencha","Kerensa Water Supply","Water Project","Expansion of existing Qarensa borehole water supply scheme with distribution system comprises of constructions of 50m3 capacity sandwich masonry collection reservoir, one water point and supply & installations of pipes for distribution system.",2022,9.1520945,42.6209556,"1500",NA,506140.3,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","No","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Fedis","Kufa Bobasa","Kufa Bobasa Spring","Water Project","This Spring development scheme includes building a spring protection structure at the source, a 25m³ collection chamber with a solar submersible pump, a 50m³ sandwich masonry service reservoir, 2 water points, 2cattle troughs, and installation of transmission and distribution pipes.",2023,9.0467907,42.2138749,"7678",NA,7151163.48,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","No","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Fedis","Riski","Riski Water Supply","Water Project","This water supply scheme was developed from an existing borehole originally drilled by the regional government. Ifaa enhanced the system by building a masonry sandwich reservoir with a 50m³ capacity, installing transmission and distribution pipelines, constructing three water points, and replacing the old diesel generator and pump with a new solar pumping system.",2025,9.0296429,42.0633033,"2705",NA,7195870.72,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","Yes","Yes","US Governemnet"
"Fedis","Umar Kule","Umar Kule Water Supply","Water Project","This water supply scheme was developed using an existing borehole originally drilled by the GoE regional government. Ifaa played a key role in making it operational by installing a solar-powered submersible pumping system. The project included constructing a 12-meter elevated, 100-cubic-meter RCC service reservoir; constructing three water points, three washing basins, and one cattle trough; and supplying and installing GI and HDPE pipes of various types for the pressure and distribution lines. After Ifaa handed over the scheme, the community contributed to the addition of three more water points",2024,9.183521,42.064634,"3216","NA",16204926.368,"Completed","Handed Over","Functional","Yes","Yes","US Governemnet"
